about-hero-image-d4e8a1.query:
Artitect was founded in 1992 by three engineers who believed that a
              folder should feel as refined as the panels it produces. Today, our
              machines fold façades, kitchens, and signage in more than 40 countries. A workshop philosophy, cast in steel. precision engineering workshop
